message.content:
@startuml
actor LoaderPlugin as LP1
participant ContentServer as CS1
database FS as F1

LP1 ->> CS1 : LoadBundleIndexes()
activate CS1
loop for each index file\n[for each bundle]
    CS1 ->> F1 : ReadFile()\nread content from disk
    activate F1
    return 
    deactivate F1
    
    note right of CS1 #lightyellow
      parse ContentBundleIndex instances,\nfill mountpoint mappings
    endnote
end loop
CS1 --> LP1 : done loading indexes\ncall OnContentReady callbacks on plugins
deactivate CS1


@enduml
